creator: lippebsd@gmail.com
text:
Hi Submitter,

According to the new forms on ports tree, we must to handle
DOCSDIR/EXAMPLESDIR in NOPORTDOCS case, thus I ask if you can send me a
new patch, handling it as follow:

.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
	(install files by here or hacking Makefile.in when is it
defined or not)
.endif

If you need any help, please let me know, thank you! :)

-- 
lippe@FreeBSD.org
Felippe de Meirelles Motta
